Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to start after the last SW-Reviewer Agreed in a case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation when preceded by at least two SW-Reviewer Agreed events
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Time from the final SW-Reviewer Agreed to the occurrence of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases that reach AE recommendation stage
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total waiting time to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation after all required reviewers have agreed (i.e., after the last SW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that include reviewer reminders (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average time for SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to be completed in cases where SW-Reviewer Declined also occurred prior to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined occurs

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation compared to the time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in the same variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Duration of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Major Revision versus those leading to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and the end of case where activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision occurs

Name: Minimum time between the first SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in complex reviewer assignment variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation when the preceding activity is SW-Reviewer No Response instead of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time until SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation is performed after the completion of all reviewer agreements (i.e., after the last instance of SW-Reviewer Agreed in the trace)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that include Assign a Different Editor or Unassign Editor activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation grouped by case:concept:name to identify outlier manuscripts
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"
